ORDER GRANTING PEITION BY DEFENDANT FUNG LUM EXPRESS CORP. DBA FUNG LUM'S FOR RELIEF PER CA GOVT. CODE SECTION 946.6

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FUNG LUM EXPRESS CORP.'S PETITION FOR RELIEF PER CA GOVERNMENT CODE 946.6 IS GRANTED. FUNG LUM HAS SHOWN THAT IT FAILED TO FILE AN ADMINISTRATIVE CLAIM WITH THE CITY WITHIN SIX MONTHS OF BEING SERVED WITH THE COMPLAINT DUE TO ITS EXCUSABLE NEGLECT IN NOT LEARNING THE FACTS UNDERLYING ITS ASSERTION THAT THE CITY'S OWN CONDUCT IS THE CAUSE OF PLAINTIFF AUDRENA DOMINGUEZ'S INJURIES. FUNG LUM ACTED WITH REASONABLE DILIGENCE WITHIN THE SIX MONTH PERIOD AND HAS SHOWN THAT IN SO ACTING IT DID NOT DISCOVER THE RELEVANT FACTS IN SUFFICIENT TIME TO FILE A TIMELY ADMINISTRATIVE CLAIM. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Set For Case Management Conference On Sep-21-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant'S Petition For Relief Per Ca Govt Code 946.6
Off Calendar Feb-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FUNG LUM EXPRESS CORP.'S Petition For Relief Per CA Government Code 946.6 is GRANTED. Fung Lum has shown that it failed to file an administrative claim with the City within six months of being served with the complaint due to its excusable neglect in not learning the facts underlying its assertion that the City's own conduct is the cause of plaintiff Audrena Dominguez's injuries. Fung Lum acted with reasonable diligence within the six month period and has shown that in so acting it did not discover the relevant facts in sufficient time to file a timely administrative claim. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-25-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint By Fung Lum Express Corp. Against City And County Of San Francisco
Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Marc Pelta of Pelta Law (415.963.1152) makes special appearance as counsel for plaintiff/non-opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT FUNG LUM EXPRESS CORP. DBA FUNG LUM's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against City And County Of San Francisco is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
